description: Tesla officially announced a 5-for-1 stock split in the form of a stock dividend to make shares more accessible to employees and retail investors.
The record date was reached, establishing which shareholders were entitled to receive four additional shares for every one share held.
The distribution date occurred, with the additional shares being issued to shareholders after the close of trading.
Tesla stock began trading on a split-adjusted basis, significantly lowering the per-share price for market participants.
